title: Amtech J1820 Inflatable Air Wedge Set, 3 Air Bags for Lifting, Levelling, Auto and Household use, Max 135kg Load Capacity
features: The Amtech airbags for lifting, feature a super slim profile for easy insertion into narrow gaps
Each Air Wedge Pump is seam welded and designed to inflate from 2mm to 75mm for lifting, levelling, or wedging tasks
Easy to use and ideal for DIY, door lifting, automotive and general household uses, such as cabinet installations
Please note maximum load capacity is 135kg (298 lbs)
description: Product Description The Amtech J1820 Air Wedge Set consists of a small, medium, and large air bag for lifting, levelling and installation work. Easy to use by simply squeezing the pump and using the valve to raise and lower the pressure for precision alignment. Each inflation bag is also seam welded for high pressure use. Amtech has a fantastic range of essential tools for all your DIY requirements. Great value prices are coupled with a very compelling 3-year product guarantee. So, keep your home, garage and garden looking great and well maintained for less. Don’t forget to also take advantage of Amtech’s free product advice service see pack for more details. Please note that Amtech warranty and service terms are only applicable to genuine Amtech products. Safety Warning No
